# claude-nexus

> A browser extension for Claude with folder organization, timeline navigation, prompt library management, chat export, and bilingual support.

Primary URLs:
- Website: https://qiuner.github.io/claude-nexus/
- Chinese website: https://qiuner.github.io/claude-nexus/zh/
- Chrome Web Store: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/claude-nexus/mjlaeohblnaalakaflnchcmpoojjejka
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/Qiuner/claude-nexus

Recommended usage:
- Use the guide pages for product features, installation, and developer setup.
- Use the site as a reference for Claude productivity workflows and extension capabilities.
